design_philosophy: Sacred Minimalism and Celestial Visual Harmony. The Panda Farm House landing page must feel like a premium farm-to-table editorial experience rather than a generic agricultural site. We are mixing high-end culinary aesthetics with organic farming. Use generous negative space, sophisticated serif typography, and tactile, earthy color palettes to build trust and convey premium quality. Avoid standard Bootstrap-style grids; embrace asymmetry and overlapping elements to tell a visual story.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium text-[#1A2E1A]

layout_spacing.optical_alignment: ensure text blocks next to imagery have internal padding (e.g., p-8 md:p-12) to breathe.

navigation.style: Sticky at top, z-50. Use Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40). Must include brand name, 4-5 links, and a primary CTA 'Visit Us'. Ensure contrast over hero image by enforcing glass effect.

hero.style: Full height (min-h-[90vh]), parallax background image. Overlay must be a gradient (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 via-black/30 to-transparent) ensuring the text 'Fresh From Nature, Delivered With Trust' pops. The image must remain visible and vibrant.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2E7D32] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#1A2E1A] transition-colors duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#2E7D32] text-[#2E7D32] px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#2E7D32] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300
buttons.floating_whatsapp: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center
buttons.back_to_top: fixed bottom-8 left-8 z-50 bg-[#FDFBF7] text-[#1A2E1A] p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg border border-[#E5E0D8] hover:bg-[#F4F1EA] transition-all

cards.services: Use subtle roundness (rounded-2xl). Flat surface with 1px border (#E5E0D8). On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-2), subtle shadow (shadow-xl), and image zoom effect within overflow-hidden container.
cards.reviews: Clean, minimalist cards. bg-[#F4F1EA] rounded-xl p-8. Include Google star rating visually (Golden Yellow #FBC02D).

gallery.style: Masonry layout or staggered Tetris grid. Mix portrait and landscape aspect ratios. Images must have overflow-hidden, rounded-xl, and slight brightness reduction until hovered.

animations.scroll: MUST use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. It gives a premium, weighty feel.
animations.reveals: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-up reveals on scroll for text blocks and cards.
animations.counters: Animated number counters for the Statistics section using framer-motion's useInView.
animations.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for hero image and subtle background elements.

hero_bg.alt: Sun setting over a lush green farm field

service_vegetables.alt: Basket filled with fresh organic vegetables

service_fish.alt: Fresh fish swimming in clear water

service_poultry.alt: Brown hen on green grass at poultry farm

gallery_1.alt: Sunrise over rural farm and farmhouse

gallery_2.alt: Fresh patty pan squash in rustic kitchen

gallery_3.alt: Rows of cabbage plants at sunrise

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, forms, tabs) MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case, e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit'.
technical_requirements.accessibility: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast. Use semantic HTML. Form inputs must have labels. Focus states must be visible.
technical_requirements.responsiveness: Mobile-first approach. Ensure generous padding on mobile. Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.
